name: Adobe Firefly
arrSource: Adobe FY25 earnings narrative — Firefly $400-500M, AI-first ARR $250M; midpoint $450M

arrClaimedVsReal.realNote: Some cannibalises stock photo revenue; growth flat at 10-11% pre and post AI.

narrative.usage: 75% of Fortune 500 "adopted" but free tier inflates. Some cannibalizes stock photo revenue.
narrative.flags: Growth completely flat at 10-11% pre AND post AI. Firefly has moved the needle zero on top-line growth.
